title: Seth Meyers roasts Elon Musk's 'historically accurate' AI version of 'The Odyssey'
excerpt: "Wow, I can't wait for that to suck."
content_html:
"Wow, I can't wait for that to suck."

 

By

Sam Haysom

Sam Haysom

Sam Haysom is the General Assignment Editor, UK, for Mashable. He covers entertainment and online culture, and writes horror fiction in his spare time.

Read Full Bio

 

on July 24, 2026

Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share on Flipboard

Elon Musk wanting to make his own "historically accurate" AI version of The Odyssey is a headline ripe for the late night picking — Kimmel guest host Colman Domingo already had his say, and in the video above Seth Meyers gleefully wades in too.

"Wow, I can't wait for that to suck," says Meyers. "Elon Musk is going to use fake actors stolen from real actors to make a fake movie that's a real version of a fake story. I'm so excited for the AI dialogue. I hope it's like ChatGPT. 'Odysseus, you must return home.' 'You got it, I can't wait to embark on this journey with you! Let's keep it light and fun! And I'm here for whatever you need.'

"Also, what do you mean historically accurate? It's a myth! Are you also making a historically accurate version of The Santa Clause?"

content_html_zh:
“哇，我等不及那件事了。”

 

By

萨姆·海瑟姆

萨姆·海瑟姆

Sam Haysom 是英国 Mashable 的总作业编辑。 他报道娱乐和网络文化，并在业余时间写恐怖小说。

阅读完整的简历

 

于 2026 年 7 月 24 日

分享到 Facebook 分享到 Twitter 分享到 Flipboard

埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 想要制作自己的“历史准确”的人工智能版《奥德赛》，这是一个适合深夜挑选的头条新闻——金梅尔客座主持人科尔曼·多明戈 (Colman Domingo) 已经发表了自己的看法，在上面的视频中，塞斯·迈耶斯 (Seth Meyers) 也兴高采烈地介入了。

“哇，我迫不及待地想看到它，”迈耶斯说。 “埃隆·马斯克将使用从真实演员那里偷来的假演员来制作一部假电影，这是一个假故事的真实版本。 我对人工智能对话感到非常兴奋。 我希望它像 ChatGPT 一样。 “奥德修斯，你必须回家。” “你明白了，我迫不及待地想和你一起踏上这段旅程！” 让我们保持轻松有趣！ 无论你需要什么，我都会在这里。

“还有，你说的历史准确是什么意思？ 这是一个神话！ 你们也在制作符合历史的圣诞老人版本吗？”

想要更多深夜的精彩吗？ 订阅 Mashable 的热门故事时事通讯。
